com.mentor.chs.plugin.filter

Interface IXActiveObjectFilter

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXEvaluator, IXFilter, IXObjectFilter<IXActiveObject>, IXPlugin

    public interface IXActiveObjectFilter
extends IXObjectFilter<IXActiveObject>, IXPlugin
    This class is used by applications to provide a means of filtering active objects. The apply method that this interface inherits from IXObjectFilter takes a Collection of IXActiveObjects representing all wires and shields on the plane. The objects which are to be shown as active must be added to the returned Collection.
    See Also:
    IXFilter, IXObjectFilter, IXActiveObject, IXPlugin

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.filter.IXObjectFilter

        apply

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion
